- Fix keygen for public key complaining about an invalid format when the key did not have a trailing newline
- Fix MCP session in claude code timing out for long-running commands
- Fix MCP list_systems tool not working properly when MCP client used absolute paths instead of just connection names
- Fix SSH VsCode and SFTP actions being shown for containers/VMs that are not configured for SSH yet
- Fix bitwarden integration not syncing properly in a new xpipe install
